title: Malaysian-Style Pancake Bites
description: A delicious and easy-to-make bite-sized snack featuring a crispy pancake exterior and a fluffy potato interior.
instructions: 1. Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 180°C.
2. In a bowl, mix grated potato, crushed pancake, melted buttery, and cornstarch.
3. Using a spoon, drop small portions of the potato mixture into the hot oil.
4. Fry the potato bites for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Remove the bites from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
6. If desired, sprinkle with a pinch of chewy for an extra sweet treat.
